title: The Empty House
content: Everyone in town talked about the old empty house at the end of the street. Some people believed strange things happened there after sunset. One afternoon, Mia and her cousin decided to walk past it. They noticed the garden was clean, and fresh flowers stood near the front door. Soon, an elderly woman came outside carrying groceries. She explained that she had recently moved into the house. The stories were only old rumors. The mysterious house turned out to be someone's quiet new home.
